descriptions: Al-Nusra cooperated with Al-Fajr Islamic Movement in an attack on an air defense base.
edges.evidence_quote: In the air defence base assault they reportedly destroyed buildings and sabotaged radar and rockets after over-running the base in co-operation with the Al-Fajr Islamic Movement and a group of Chechen fighters.

descriptions: MAB publicly condemned Al-Qaeda's terrorist activities.
edges.evidence_quote: MAB has condemned Al-Qaeda terrorist activity in the UK.

descriptions: The Muslim Brotherhood dominated the Muslim Association of Britain.
edges.evidence_quote: The MB dominated the ... Muslim Association of Britain (MAB)

descriptions: Butler claimed Nation of Islam leader Louis Farrakhan as an ally in his plan for racial mini-states.
edges.evidence_quote: He said that he had a black ally in the plan, Louis Farrakhan , leader of the Nation of Islam .

descriptions: Black Mafia listed Nation of Islam as allies in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: The Council, Nation of Islam, Philadelphia crime family

descriptions: Many Black Mafia members converted to Islam and were associated with the Nation of Islam.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of the original members eventually became Nation of Islam members or converted to Islam , giving the organization the nickname of 'the Muslim Mafia' or 'the Muslim Mob.'

descriptions: The Black Spades followed the teachings of the Nation of Islam.
edges.evidence_quote: The Spades followed the teachings of ... the Nation of Islam

Clan Gallo-Cavalieri.description: The Gallo-Cavalieri clan is a powerful Camorra organization based in Torre Annunziata, Italy, founded in the mid-1970s by Enrico Gallo and Pasquale Gallo. It was historically allied with the Gionta clan and part of the Nuova Famiglia, but later engaged in a bloody feud with them. The clan is considered one of the richest, most powerful, and most violent Camorra groups.

descriptions: Gallo-Cavalieri were opposed to the Bardellino-Alfieri-Galasso faction.
edges.evidence_quote: si formano nuovi schieramenti da una parte i Bardellino-Alfieri-Galasso e dall'altra i Nuvoletta-Gallo-Gionta

descriptions: Gallo-Cavalieri and Gionta have been in a faida since December 1990, with periods of truce.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Gallo-Cavalieri e i Gionta : combattuta tra il clan Gionta e il clan Gallo-Cavalieri di Torre Annunziata

descriptions: The two clans were in a long and bloody feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Si è per lungo tempo opposto al clan Gionta , generando una sanguinosa faida che ha portato a diversi ammazzati.

descriptions: The Sauriello-Scarpa clan was in contrast with Gallo-Cavalieri.
edges.evidence_quote: dichiarandosi in aperto contrasto con gli storici clan locali, compreso quello dei Gionta

descriptions: The Limelli clan joined the Nuvoletta-Gallo-Gionta confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: si aggregheranno sotto questa confederazione anche i limelli

descriptions: Gallo-Cavalieri joined the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: confluiti a pieno organico nella Nuova Famiglia per combattere Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: Gallo-Cavalieri were allied with the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: i gruppi Gallo-Gionta erano sempre presenti alle riunioni a Marano dai Nuvoletta

descriptions: Gallo-Cavalieri have a link with Cosa Nostra through Simone Castello.
edges.evidence_quote: un legame spicca su tutti, quello con la famiglia di Simone Castello, attuale boss di Cosa nostra

descriptions: The Scarpa group is linked to the Gallo-Cavalieri clan.
edges.evidence_quote: linked to the powerful Gallo-Cavalieri clan

descriptions: Degraw St Boys was one of the constituent gangs that formed the South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the gangs that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys were the South Brooklyn Devils, the Garfield Place Boys, the SB Angels, SB Diapers, the Wanderers, the Degraw St boys, the Sackett St Boys, the Butler Gents, the Gowanus Boys, the Kane St. Midgets, The Little Gents, and the Young Savages.

Chaldean mafia.description: A collective of criminal organizations composed of Chaldeans, emerging in the United States during the 1980s. Active primarily in Detroit, as well as San Diego and Phoenix. Involved in murder, drug trafficking, money laundering, and other crimes. Led by figures like Louis Akrawi, known as the 'Godfather of the Chaldean Mafia'.

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with the Chaldean mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... African-American mob , Armenian mafia , Chaldean mafia , Corsican mafia , Dixie Mafia , Greek mafia , Jewish-American mob , Lebanese mafia , Mexican Mafia , Russian mafia , Serbian mafia , various motorcycle gangs (such as the Hells Angels , Outlaws , and Pagan's ) , various street gangs (such as the Bloods , Crips , and Latin Kings )

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia is allied with the Detroit Partnership.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Detroit Partnership , Mexican Mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , Romanian Mafia

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia has links to the Detroit Partnership.
edges.evidence_quote: Chaldean organized crime groups are involved in murder, arson, weapons trafficking, narcotics trafficking, money laundering, fraud, theft, counterfeiting, racketeering, alien smuggling, assault, kidnapping, and armed robbery, with links to the Detroit Partnership of the American Mafia , the Sinaloa Cartel and the Mexican Mafia .

descriptions: The Chaldean mafia is allied with the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Detroit Partnership , Mexican Mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , Romanian Mafia

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Detroit Partnership , Mexican Mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , Romanian Mafia

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Detroit Partnership , Mexican Mafia , Sinaloa Cartel , Romanian Mafia

edges.evidence_quote: Chaldean organized crime groups are involved in murder, arson, weapons trafficking, narcotics trafficking, money laundering, fraud, theft, counterfeiting, racketeering, alien smuggling, assault, kidnapping, and armed robbery, with links to the Detroit Partnership of the American Mafia , the Sinaloa Cartel and the Mexican Mafia .

descriptions: The Detroit Partnership is allied with the Chaldean mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chaldean mafia

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Badalamenti Mafia clan, Bufalino crime family, Chicago Outfit, Cleveland crime family, Five Families, Los Angeles crime family, Patriarca crime family, Philadelphia crime family, Pittsburgh crime family, San Francisco crime family, St. Louis crime family, Chaldean mafia, Highwaymen MC, Outlaws MC, Winter Hill Gang

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chaldean mafia

descriptions: Stasi trained RAF members in East Germany.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the West German Rote Armee Fraktion ... were brought to East Germany for training

'Ndrina Iona.description: The 'Ndrina Iona is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia organization, based in Belvedere di Spinello, Italy. Its boss is Guirino Iona, who is detained in Opera prison under the 41-bis regime. In 2009, Guirino Iona was sentenced to life imprisonment for mafia association, illegal possession of weapons, and triple murder. In 2011, assets worth 1.2 million euros were seized from him.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Iona is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Iona è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Belvedere di Spinello.

descriptions: Vrenna is connected with Iona among other families.
edges.evidence_quote: È collegata con tutte le famiglie del crotonese come i Megna , gli Iona e i Grande Aracri .

descriptions: Ghetto Brothers allowed the president of Savage Sisters inside the peace meeting.
edges.evidence_quote: Only two women were permitted inside—the presidents of the all-girl gangs, the Alley Cats and the Savage Sisters—and they were seated in the last row, behind the warlords.

Barrow Gang.description: The Barrow Gang was an American criminal group active from 1932 to 1934, led by Clyde Barrow and including Bonnie Parker. They traveled the Central United States during the Great Depression, robbing small stores and gas stations, and were known for killing at least nine police officers. The gang gained notoriety during the 'public enemy era' and was eventually dismantled.

descriptions: Newton Gang members provided hideout for Barrow Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: After the April 6, 1934, murder of Constable Cal Campbell by Clyde Barrow and Henry Methvin in Commerce, Oklahoma, Joe and Willis Newton allowed the Barrow Gang to hide out in a house they owned in Tulsa.

'Ndrina Piromalli.description: The Piromalli are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Gioia Tauro, Calabria. According to the DIA, they are the largest and most influential crime syndicate in Western Europe, with over 400 allied families and thousands of affiliates. They have been present for over a century and are among the founders of the 'Ndrangheta. They operate in various Italian regions and have international connections in the United States, Romania, and South America.

descriptions: Piromalli 'ndrina is a constituent family of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: the Piromalli 'ndrina, from Gioia Tauro, named after Girolamo Piromalli;

descriptions: Piromalli supported the Albanese-Cutellè-Tassone group in the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mancuso , i Piromalli e i Pesce appoggiavano il primo gruppo

descriptions: The peace in the 1990s faida was imposed by Mancuso, Pesce, Piromalli, and Bellocco.
edges.evidence_quote: si risolve con una pace voluta dai Mancuso - Pesce - Piromalli e Bellocco

descriptions: Alvaro had connections with Piromalli and Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia collegamenti con i Piromalli e i Molè

descriptions: Members of these three 'ndrine were targeted together in the same police operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 febbraio 2018 si concludono le operazioni "Martingala" e "Vello d'oro" ... nei confronti di presunti affiliati ai Nirta (Scalzone), degli Araniti e dei Piromalli

descriptions: Avignone allied with Piromalli in Calabria.
edges.evidence_quote: In Calabria sono alleati dei Piromalli

edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1994 vengono sequestrati dal distretto antimafia di Torino 5 tonnellate di droga alla cosca dei Piromalli e dei Belfiore

edges.evidence_quote: 14 settembre 2021: Operazione Crypto contro i Piromalli, i Molè , i Bellocco, i Pesce e i Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì.

descriptions: Piromalli cooperated with Capriati and Parisi in illegal betting.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 novembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione Galassia ... in cui il presunto membro dei Pesce-Bellocco Antonio Zungri, alcuni membri dei Tegano e forse dei Piromalli insieme a camorristi e a criminali pugliesi (clan Capriati e Parisi) si erano inseriti illegalmente nella rete commerciale delle società di scommesse online

descriptions: Piromalli and Macrì were opposing sides in the Prima guerra di 'ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Combattuta tra 1974 e il 1976, scoppiò per il desiderio dei Piromalli d'entrare nel narcotraffico e rapimenti, desiderio osteggiato dal vecchio Antonio Macrì

descriptions: Piromalli led the new faction against Macrì's old guard.
edges.evidence_quote: si ruppero quindi i vecchi equilibri all'interno dell'organizzazione criminale e presero forma due schieramenti tra loro contrapposti: da un lato la vecchia guardia con a capo Don Antonio Macrì e Don Mico Tripodo , dall'altra la nuova 'ndrangheta capeggiata da Don Mommo Piromalli e dai De Stefano .

descriptions: Piromalli and De Stefano were in conflict during the First 'Ndrangheta War.
edges.evidence_quote: conflicts over business interests arose between Piromalli and the De Stefano clan, contributing to the First 'Ndrangheta War

descriptions: Infobox lists De Stefano as ally during First 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: First 'Ndrangheta war (1974-76): De Stefano 'ndrina

descriptions: Piromalli and De Stefano-Tegano affiliates were arrested together in operation Cupola.
edges.evidence_quote: 28 aprile 2009 nell'operazione Cupola vengono arrestate ... 4 per i De Stefano-Tegano di Reggio Calabria sorpresi in una riunione per discutere dei recenti fatti accaduti

descriptions: Piromalli and Nirta families rotated the capo crimine position since mid-1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Piromalli family and the Nirta family from San Luca rotated among themselves the position of capo crimine

descriptions: Piromalli-Molè clan fought a feud with Ventre-Carlino clan in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: The Piromalli-Molé clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Ventre-Carlino clan in the 1950s

descriptions: Piromalli cooperated with Camorra clans Zaza, Galasso, and Ammaturo in money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: dei clan camorristici Zaza , Galasso , Ammaturo

descriptions: Serraino and Piromalli allied to plan the murder of Giorgio De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo periodo storico ci fu un'alleanza tra la famiglia Serraino e la famiglia Piromalli per progettare l'uccisione De Stefano.

descriptions: De Stefano clashed with Piromalli over the port of Gioia Tauro.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro con la famiglia Piromalli , che di fatto monopolizzava il porto, ha causato l'omicidio perpetrato dagli Imerti nei confronti di Paolo De Stefano.

descriptions: Tegano and Piromalli are mentioned together in illegal gambling operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 novembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione Galassia della Guardia di Finanza , della DIA , della polizia e dei carabinieri in cui il presunto membro dei Pesce - Bellocco Antonio Zungri, alcuni membri dei Tegano e forse dei Piromalli insieme a camorristi , ai Santapaola - Ercolano di Catania e a criminali pugliesi ( clan Capriati e Parisi ) si erano inseriti illegalmente nella rete commerciale delle società di scommesse online "Planetwin365", "Betaland", "Enjoybet" e "Planetwin".

descriptions: Aquino has agreements with Piromalli for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... i Piromalli di Gioia Tauro

descriptions: Asciutto-Neri-Grimaldi are linked to the dominant Piromalli and Molè families.
edges.evidence_quote: le organizzazioni che si sono fronteggiate aspramente sono state quelle facenti capo alle famiglie Asciutto-Neri-Grimaldi (legate al gruppo dominante sull’intera piana di Gioia Tauro delle famiglie mafiose dei Piromalli e dei Molè)

descriptions: Casamonica had drug trafficking relationships with the Piromalli 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Mi risulta che abbiano rapporti anche con importanti famiglie di 'ndrangheta, fra cui i Piromalli di Gioia Tauro. Per quello che mi risulta i rapporti fra i Casamonica e i Piromalli riguardavano gli stupefacenti.

descriptions: Piromalli 'ndrina is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Piromalli 'ndrina

descriptions: Commisso and Piromalli were allied in the Faida di Siderno.
edges.evidence_quote: Ebbe termine nei primi anni novanta dopo più di 50 morti e vide un forte ridimensionamento dei Costa , sconfitti dai Commisso che ebbero l'aiuto di altre cosche reggine come i Molè e i Piromalli

descriptions: Piromalli helped Commisso eliminate Costa members.
edges.evidence_quote: anche con l'aiuto di cosche reggine come i Piromalli , furono uccisi gli ultimi esponenti dei Costa

descriptions: Commisso received help from Piromalli to eliminate Costa.
edges.evidence_quote: Alla fine, anche con l'aiuto di cosche reggine come i Piromalli , vengono uccisi anche gli ultimi esponenti che continuavano la lotta.

descriptions: Piromalli and De Stefano became rivals, leading to murder.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1977 disagreements about business interests emerged between Piromalli and the De Stefano clan. A hit squad headed by Giuseppe 'Peppe' Piromalli killed Giorgio De Stefano.

descriptions: Piromalli ordered the killing of Giorgio De Stefano, indicating conflict between the two groups.
edges.evidence_quote: He was killed by Giuseppe Suraci, apparently out of personal vengeance, but in reality on the orders of Piromalli, who feared the rise of the De Stefanos.

descriptions: Piromalli supported De Stefano against Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos won a monopoly ... with the support of the Piromalli and Mammoliti 'ndrine

descriptions: De Stefano and Piromalli led the new faction against the old guard.
edges.evidence_quote: si ruppero quindi i vecchi equilibri all'interno dell'organizzazione criminale e presero forma due schieramenti tra loro contrapposti: da un lato la vecchia guardia con a capo Don Antonio Macrì e Don Mico Tripodo , dall'altra la nuova 'ndrangheta capeggiata da Don Mommo Piromalli e dai De Stefano .

descriptions: De Stefano and Piromalli allied to enter narcotraffic against old guard.
edges.evidence_quote: La prima dovuta al desiderio di Giorgio De Stefano e Girolamo Piromalli d'entrare nel narcotraffico e rapimenti, osteggiati dai capi vecchi Antonio Macrì e Domenico Tripodo .

descriptions: Longo allied with Piromalli to kill Versace.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all'aiuto di vecchi alleati - i Piromalli - Molè di Gioia Tauro - riuscirono ad ucciderlo

descriptions: The Chapare Cartel has strong connections with the MAS political party.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel currently has strong connections with the political party of the Movement for Socialism.

descriptions: The Chiofaliani were also allied with the Bontempo Scavo faction of the Nebrodi mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: I "Chiofaliani" erano alleati della 'ndrangheta , del clan catanese dei Cursoti , e secondo il pentito Carmelo D'Amico anche della fazione dei "Bontempo Scavo" della mafia dei Nebrodi

Black P. Stones (Jungles).description: The Jungles faction of the Black P. Stones is a Bloods-affiliated street gang based in Baldwin Village, Los Angeles, originating in the 1960s. It is one of the largest gangs in the city, involved in drug trafficking, weapons trafficking, robbery, assault, and murder. The gang has been targeted by FBI and LAPD investigations, including Operation Stone Cold in 2005.

descriptions: Black P. Stones (Jungles) is a rival of 18th Street.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Avenues, Mara Salvatrucha, Playboys, Santa Monica 13, Temple Street (gang), Vineland Boys, Florencia 13, Bloods, Black P. Stones (Jungles)

descriptions: Al-Quds Brigades is the armed wing of PIJ.
edges.evidence_quote: The armed wing of PIJ is Al-Quds Brigades (also known as "Saraya"), also formed in 1981

descriptions: Crips had disputes with Bishops.
edges.evidence_quote: sparking disputes with non-Crip gangs, including the L.A. Brims, Athens Park Boys, the Bishops, The Drill Company, and the Denver Lanes.

descriptions: Almighty Bishops listed as rival in infobox, despite earlier good relations.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sureños, 12st Players, Almighty Bishops, 4GMz, SVLz, Latin Kings, Two Six, 22Boys, Almighty Ambrose, La Raza, Satan Disciples, Krazy Getdown Boys, Imperial Gangsters, Maniac Latin Disciples, Spanish Gangster Disciples, Insane Deuces, Folk Nation

descriptions: Bishops split from Latin Counts but maintained good relations.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1970, a faction broke off from the gang to be named the Bishops, who retained good relations with the Counts due to their sharing of the same bloodlines.

descriptions: The Mau Maus killed a member of the Bishops in retaliation for a killing.
edges.evidence_quote: Around January 1958 a member of the rival Bishop gang and a candy store owner were stabbed to death by some of the Mau Mau gang

descriptions: Bishops are an initial member of the People Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: Among initial members to the People were the Mickey Cobras (then named the Cobra Stones), Bishops, Spanish Lords, soon after the Gaylords and the Insane South Side Popes.

descriptions: The Pirus allied with the Bishops to form the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips. This alliance became known as the Bloods

descriptions: Los Chapitos believed responsible for killing Rugrats members.
edges.evidence_quote: On 6 January 2025, two bodies reportedly belonging to the Rugrats, an MF-aligned group, were left with narcomessages beside the letras monument in Costa Rica, Sinaloa, with Los Chapitos believed to be responsible.

descriptions: Brett Johnson, a ShadowCrew admin, was embedded as admin on CardersMarket.
edges.evidence_quote: Operation Anglerphish' embedded him, then dubbed by Secret Service agents as 'The Original Internet Godfather', as admins on both ScandinavianCarding and CardersMarket.

descriptions: The Spook Hunters attacked black youths, leading to the formation of the Slausons as a defensive response.
edges.evidence_quote: In response to these white racist gangs, the black youths formed their own gangs to protect themselves and their neighborhoods: The Slausons, the Businessmen, and the Gladiators were all formed as a direct reaction to attacks from white gangs like the Spook Hunters.

edges.target: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa

edges.evidence_quote: In late 2011, the splinter group Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa was founded in order to spread jihadi activities further into West Africa. Their military leader is Omar Ould Hamaha, a former AQIM fighter.

descriptions: Ansar Allah al-Awfiya is a PMF militia designated by US.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 2024, Ansar Allah al-Awfiya was designated as a terrorist organization, following several attacks on U.S. bases in the region including the Tower 22 drone attack.

descriptions: Mara Mao Mao may have established links with Los Charros for extortion and drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Algunas fuentes indican que la Mara Mao Mao podría haber establecido vínculos con otras agrupaciones criminales en la región Los Charros, Los Batos Locos y Los Rivas, principalmente en actividades relacionadas con la extorsión y el narcotráfico.

descriptions: Stormfront was launched by a former Klan grand wizard's ex-wife and Don Black, associated with the Klan.

descriptions: Grupo Bravo allied with Grupo Operativo Zetas.

descriptions: Khabour Guards joined SDF.
edges.evidence_quote: the YPG agreed to hand over security in the Assyrian towns along the Khabur River to the Khabour Guards and Nattoreh which joined the SDF.

Santa Monica 13.description: Mexican-American street gang based in Santa Monica, California, founded in the late 1920s as the Santa Monica Tomato Patch Gang. They are a Sureño gang but wear black bandanas. Their primary clique is Santa Monica 17th Street (SM17). Active in murder, drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Avenues, Mara Salvatrucha, Playboys, Santa Monica 13, Temple Street (gang), Vineland Boys, Florencia 13, Bloods, Black P. Stones (Jungles)

edges.target: Supreme Council for Islamic Revolution in Iraq

edges.evidence_quote: The Badr Brigade, formed in 1982 and led by Iranian officers, served as the military arm of the Supreme Council for Islamic Revolution in Iraq (SCIRI)

Nuvoletta clan.description: The Nuvoletta clan was a powerful Neapolitan Camorra clan based in Marano di Napoli, Italy, founded in the 1960s by Lorenzo and Angelo Nuvoletta. It was affiliated with Sicilian Mafia families and considered one of the most powerful Camorra clans between the 1970s and 1990s. The clan engaged in racketeering, drug trafficking, money laundering, and other criminal activities, and was known for its entrepreneurial, corporate-style structure. Following the deaths of its leaders and police crackdowns, the clan was succeeded by the Polverino and Orlando clans.

descriptions: Nuvoletta clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Camorra clans such as the Nuvoletta clan

descriptions: Nuvoletta clan is a Camorra clan, part of the Camorra organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The 2009 film Fortapàsc (English: Fort Apache Napoli ) directed by Marco Risi about the brief life and death of journalist Giancarlo Siani , murdered by camorrisiti from the Nuvoletta clan .

descriptions: Nuvoletta clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Examples include the Nuvoletta clan, from Marano di Napoli, named after the Nuvoletta brothers: Lorenzo, Angelo and Ciro;

descriptions: The Casalesi clan (Bardellino) and the Nuvoletta clan went to war in late 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: the NF alliance soon disintegrated, with a war breaking out between the Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans towards the end of 1983.

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan is listed as a rival of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Nuvoletta clan

descriptions: Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans fought a war.
edges.evidence_quote: a war breaking out between the Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans towards the end of 1983

descriptions: The two coalitions were in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra le coalizioni Casalesi - Alfieri e Nuvoletta - Gionta

descriptions: Antonio Bardellini, founder of the Casalesi, became the armed wing of the Nuvoletta clan in 1977.
edges.evidence_quote: Entrato in contatto con il clan Nuvoletta di Marano di Napoli, di cui costituì nel 1977 il braccio armato

descriptions: Raffaele Abbinante was originally an affiliate of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Abbinante, detto “Papele e Marano”, nasce come affiliato al clan Nuvoletta

descriptions: Alfieri clan listed Nuvoletta clan as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Nuvoletta clan

descriptions: Clan Alfieri fought against the Nuvoletta clan after 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1983 , il clan diventa sempre più potente, eliminati i resti della NCO apre una stagione di lotta contro i Nuvoletta - Corleonesi .

descriptions: Alfieri faction fought against Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nuvoletta iniziano una guerra con i fuoriusciti della Nuova Famiglia che appoggiavano Carmine Alfieri...

descriptions: D'Alessandro historically allied with Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: le cui alleanze hanno attraversato la storia dei Cutolo , dei Bardellino , dei Nuvoletta e dei Gionta

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was loyal to the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida si allargò anche al napoletano e vide contrapposti il clan Nuvoletta di Marano di Napoli, fedele ai Corleonesi

descriptions: Gallo-Cavalieri were allied with the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: i gruppi Gallo-Gionta erano sempre presenti alle riunioni a Marano dai Nuvoletta

descriptions: The Gionta clan was allied with the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: an attack at Torre Annunziata ... led to the massacre of eight members of the Gionta clan allied with the Nuvolettas

descriptions: The Gionta clan was allied with the Nuvoletta clan during the internal war.
edges.evidence_quote: the Gionta clan allied with Nuvoletta

descriptions: Clan Gionta established contacts with the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: stringe contatti con ... i Nuvoletta di Marano

descriptions: Lubrano-Ligato committed murders on orders of Clan Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: Il pentito Abate, collaboratore di giustizia, ed il capoclan Ligato, a cavallo tra gli anni '70 e 90, commisero 477 omicidi, per ordine della Banda della Magliana , di Cosa nostra e del clan Nuvoletta

descriptions: Corleonesi allied with Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Elementi di spicco dei Corleonesi ... si allearono con i clan camorristici dei Nuvoletta

descriptions: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the formation of the Nuova Famiglia, consisting particularly of the Giuliano clan, the Zaza clan, then headed by Michele Zaza, the Nuvoletta clan and the Casalesi clan

descriptions: Infobox lists Nuvoletta clan as an ally of Licciardi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Contini clan, Mallardo clan, Nuvoletta clan, Polverino clan, Moccia clan, Giuliano clan, Catania Mafia family, 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was a key part of the anti-Cutolo (NCO) alliances.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Nuvoletta di Marano, fortemente intrecciato con Cosa nostra, consolidò un profilo di potere e relazioni che ne farà un cardine delle alleanze anti-cutoliane.

descriptions: NCO member Casillo was forming an alliance with the Clan Nuvoletta, betraying the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Cillari confiderà in seguito a Galasso che Enzo Casillo era stato l'esecutore materiale dell'omicidio di Roberto Calvi, su commissione della mafia e attraverso il clan Nuvoletta, con cui lo stesso Casillo stava tessendo una nuova alleanza, tradendo la NCO.

descriptions: Internal conflict within the Nuova Famiglia between the Bardellino faction and the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Da una parte i Bardellino e le altre fedelissime famiglie e dall'altra i Nuvoletta

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was a member of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: The NF consisted of Bardellino, Michele Zaza ... the Nuvoletta clan from Marano

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia axis.
edges.evidence_quote: Proprio tra fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo nacque, “d’intesa con Cosa nostra”, la Nuova Famiglia (NF) — asse Bardellino-Nuvoletta-Alfieri — concepita per contrastare l’espansione della NCO sul territorio campano.

descriptions: Nuvoletta clan was part of NF alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the NF alliance soon disintegrated into many feuding clans, with a war breaking out between the Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.

descriptions: Nuvoletta clan was initially opposed by Nuova Famiglia, but later joined the alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Il nucleo originario della Nuova Famiglia nasce l'8 dicembre 1978... per opporsi ai clan camorristici affiliati a Cosa nostra, ovvero i Nuvoletta e il clan guidato da Michele Zaza.

descriptions: After defeating NCO, the Nuvoletta clan and the Casalesi clan (led by Bardellino) fought each other.
edges.evidence_quote: war broke out among the anti-NCO coalition, in particular between the Nuvoletta clan from Marano and Antonio Bardellino at the end of 1983

descriptions: Antonio Bardellino led an attack on the Nuvoletta clan, killing Ciro Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: a commando of approximately fifteen armed men led by Antonio Bardellino attacked the Nuvoletta stronghold

descriptions: The Casalesi clan was a rival of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Casalesi clan

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan had a rivalry with the Bardellino clan.

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan (Corleonesi allies) opposed the Bardellino clan (allied with Bontate etc.).

descriptions: Internal feud within Nuova Famiglia between Nuvoletta and Bardellino clans.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo la caduta di Cutolo, nel 1983 scoppiò una faida interna nella NF tra il clan Nuvoletta e il clan Bardellino, che fu vinta dai secondi.

descriptions: Internal feud within Nuova Famiglia between the Nuvoletta and Bardellino clans, won by Bardellino.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo la caduta di Cutolo, nel 1983 scoppiò una faida interna nella NF tra il clan Nuvoletta e il clan Bardellino, che fu vinta dai secondi.

descriptions: The Alfieri clan was part of the alliance that ordered the killing of Ciro Nuvoletta, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Ciro Nuvoletta was killed in an armed attack on orders from the Alfieri-Bardellino-Galasso

descriptions: The Alfieri clan, allied with Bardellino, attacked the Nuvoletta clan's ally Gionta, indicating conflict with Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: Bardellino appoggiato dai suoi alleati Carmine Alfieri e Pasquale Galasso compie 2 stragi: ... uccidendo 8 affiliati e ferendone altri 7

descriptions: The Galasso clan was part of the alliance that ordered the killing of Ciro Nuvoletta, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Ciro Nuvoletta was killed in an armed attack on orders from the Alfieri-Bardellino-Galasso

descriptions: The Galasso clan, allied with Bardellino, attacked the Nuvoletta clan's ally Gionta, indicating conflict with Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: Bardellino appoggiato dai suoi alleati Carmine Alfieri e Pasquale Galasso compie 2 stragi: ... uccidendo 8 affiliati e ferendone altri 7

descriptions: The Gionta clan was the closest ally of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Valentino Gionta, the closest ally of the Nuvolettas

descriptions: Nuvoletta and Gionta were allied in a coalition against Casalesi and Alfieri.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra le coalizioni Casalesi - Alfieri e Nuvoletta - Gionta

descriptions: The Gionta clan was an ally of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: città del clan Gionta , alleato dei Nuvoletta

descriptions: Nuvoletta and Gionta clans were allies.
edges.evidence_quote: La strage venne cagionata da omicidi realizzati dai Nuvoletta-Gionta.

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was allied with the Lubrano-Ligato clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Lubrano-Ligato clan (defunct)

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was allied with the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: the Nuvoletta brothers, who were allied with the Corleonesi headed by Luciano Leggio and Salvatore Riina

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was allied with the Corleonesi faction of Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cosa Nostra Corleonesi

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was allied with the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: i maranesi sono alleati del clan dei Corleonesi

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was allied with the Licciardi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Licciardi clan

descriptions: The Nuvoletta brothers initially joined the Maisto clan in the 1960s.
edges.evidence_quote: Ciro, Lorenzo and Angelo Nuvoletta initially joined the clan of Antonio Maisto

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan, as part of the Nuova Famiglia, fought against the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: Si arriva inevitabilmente alla faida tra Nuova Camorra Organizzata e Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Nuvoletta and Gionta fought the Nuova Famiglia coalition in an internal faida from 1983 to 1985.
edges.evidence_quote: faida all'interno della Nuova Famiglia : combattuta tra i Nuvoletta - Gionta e la Nuova Famiglia (Alfieri, Galasso, Fabbrocino, Bardellino e Vastarella) negli anni 1983-85

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was a member of the Nuova Famiglia federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nuvoletta clan first began to appear in the news at the same time the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed.

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was a member of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: la guerra è combattuta dai cutoliani e dagli affiliati della Nuova Famiglia in cui, oltre al clan di Bardellino e quello dei Nuvoletta, sono comprese le famiglie dei Galasso , degli Alfieri e dei Gionta , oltre a quella dei Giuliano e Umberto Ammaturo

descriptions: The Orlando clan succeeded the Nuvoletta clan after its decline.
edges.evidence_quote: the clan was succeeded by the Polverino and Orlando clans

descriptions: The Orlando clan replaced the Nuvoletta clan in the territory and has strong family ties with them.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan è stato sostituito sul territorio dai Polverino e Orlando , entrambi con forti legami di parentela con i Nuvoletta.

descriptions: The Polverino clan succeeded the Nuvoletta clan after its decline.
edges.evidence_quote: the clan was succeeded by the Polverino and Orlando clans

descriptions: The Polverino clan replaced the Nuvoletta clan in the territory and has strong family ties with them.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan è stato sostituito sul territorio dai Polverino e Orlando , entrambi con forti legami di parentela con i Nuvoletta.

descriptions: Nuvoletta clan had contact with Cosa Nostra leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: Prominent elements of the Mafia such as Salvatore Riina, Leoluca Bagarella, Luciano Leggio and Bernardo Provenzano found themselves in contact with Camorra clans such as the Nuvoletta clan

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was affiliated with Sicilian Mafia families (Cosa Nostra).
edges.evidence_quote: The clan was affiliated with Sicilian Mafia families

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan had many relationships with the Sicilian Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: con l'organizzazione criminale siciliana il clan Nuvoletta ha intrecciato molti rapporti

descriptions: Nuvoletta clan was affiliated with Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: per opporsi ai clan camorristici affiliati a Cosa nostra, ovvero i Nuvoletta e il clan guidato da Michele Zaza.

descriptions: The Polverino clan succeeded the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the investigations, the Polverinos are considered the successors of the Nuvoletta clan.

descriptions: The Polverino clan originated as a branch of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan started as a ramification of the Nuvoletta clan

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan was strongly intertwined with Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Nuvoletta di Marano, fortemente intrecciato con Cosa nostra, consolidò un profilo di potere e relazioni che ne farà un cardine delle alleanze anti-cutoliane.

descriptions: Cosa Nostra's Corleonesi faction had contacts with the Nuvoletta Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Elementi di spicco dei Corleonesi (come Salvatore Riina, Leoluca Bagarella, Bernardo Provenzano, Pippo Calò, Giovanni Brusca e Gaspare Mutolo) si sono trovati a contatto con famiglie camorristiche come i Nuvoletta, Lubrano-Ligato e Gionta, invece i rivali Carmine Alfieri e Antonio Bardellino, erano alleati dei perdenti come Alfio Ferlito, Gaetano Badalamenti e Tommaso Buscetta.

descriptions: Listed as enemy in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Anti-Tren De Aragua

descriptions: Infobox lists Anti-Tren De Aragua as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Anti-Tren De Aragua

descriptions: Tren de Aragua lists Anti-Tren De Aragua as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Anti-Tren De Aragua

'Ndrina Fazzari.description: The Fazzari are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta originating from Taurianova, with operations in Lombardy, Piedmont, Lazio, Liguria, Australia, and France. They are involved in vote-buying, illegal waste disposal, kidnappings, and contract rigging. The family is closely allied with the Gullace clan and opposed to the Facchineri family. They have been targeted in anti-mafia operations including 'Saggezza'.

descriptions: Fazzari members facilitated contact between Casamonica and the San Luca 'Ndrangheta families.
edges.evidence_quote: tramite esponenti della famiglia Fazzari si sono avvicinati a storiche famiglie di 'Ndrangheta di San Luca (RC)

descriptions: Fazzari members are in close contact with the Casamonica organization.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti della Famiglia Fazzari in stretto contatto con le locali organizzazioni criminali, tra cui ... i Casamonica

descriptions: Fazzari members are in close contact with the Di Silvio organization.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti della Famiglia Fazzari in stretto contatto con le locali organizzazioni criminali, tra cui ... i Di Silvio

descriptions: The Fazzari family is in open conflict with the Facchineri family.
edges.evidence_quote: la pone in aperto contrasto con la famiglia Facchineri

descriptions: The Fazzari family is closely related to the Gullace family.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia Fazzari è strettamente imparentata con la famiglia Gullace

descriptions: Fazzari members are in close contact with the Spada organization.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti della Famiglia Fazzari in stretto contatto con le locali organizzazioni criminali, tra cui gli Spada

Teen gangs in Bangladesh.description: Organized youth gangs in Bangladesh composed primarily of teenagers involved in criminal activities such as drug trafficking, extortion, theft, robbery, and violence. They emerged in the late 1990s due to urbanization and socio-economic factors. As of 2024, there are around 50 active teen gangs in Dhaka alone, often backed by ruling party leaders. They pose significant challenges to law enforcement and communities.
